summary: Tightened the opening so the chapter picks up more directly from Chapter 10's Mercer handoff and avoids restating the same depot setup, while leaving the chapter's incident, confession, and Sunday-off exit intact.

Compressed the repeated Mercer sign-in and route-slip setup in the second paragraph.
